source: Border Pulse southbound model (Google Maps Platform Distance Matrix API)

crossings.name: San Ysidro
crossings.route_origin: I-5 approach north of San Ysidro
crossings.route_destination: Tijuana Centro just past the border
crossings.methodology: Estimated as live drive time minus a calibrated free-flow baseline on the southbound approach segment.
